postReview.title: Venezuela 1-1 Brazil: Super sub Segovia holds Selecao to shock draw
postReview.description: Telasco Segovia scored just 41 seconds after entering the pitch to give Venezuela a shock 1-1 draw against Brazil in a World Cup qualifier.
